g.text: Prep checklist — Enter toggles an item, Escape returns.
Create a Discord webhook and paste it into settings.yaml (Server Settings → Integrations → Webhooks → New Webhook
Set up an app password + email alerts in settings.yaml (Gmail: enable 2FA, then create an App Password; use it as
Get a free Best Buy developer API key (https://developer.bestbuy.com/ — enables clean, sanctioned stock checks.)
Enable the Reddit r/PokemonTCGDeals feed in settings.yaml (Best legit early-warning that a preorder just went live
Call/email your local card shop to preorder 30th Celebration items (LGS allocate by order history + organized play
Create a Pokémon Center account; save payment + address (Preorders drop quietly ~78 days before release; be ready
Sign up for the Pokémon Center email newsletter (Main sanctioned way to catch quiet drops without hammering the si
Plan to disable VPN/ad-blocker for PC checkout (Queue-it + DataDome/Imperva flag VPNs & datacenter IPs; they break
Create a Target account; save payment + address in the app (The Target app checks out faster than target.com on ho
Consider a RedCard for 5% off + occasional early access
Create a Walmart account; save payment + address (Only buy 'Sold & shipped by Walmart'. Keep qty to 1–2 — more tri
Create a Best Buy account; save payment + address (Restocks cluster Tue/Thu early mornings.)
Create a BN.com account; note your local store (Low bot competition — product often lingers. Great MSRP fallback.)
Have a Sam's membership ready for scheduled online drops (Scheduled drops route through a short (~10–15 min) queue
Have a Costco membership; watch for warehouse/online bundles (Bundles are warehouse-only, usually no restock — the
Plan for in-store walk-in (TCG preorders discontinued Feb 2025) (Ships direct to stores now; limit 2/customer (5 o
